Our Story
HOW WE
SERVE GAMERS

Every customer who walks into Rutvi Tech has a different need. A student wanting their first gaming laptop. A creator needing more power. A hardcore gamer ready to build the ultimate PC. We've served them all — right here in Nanded.

01 The Student First Gaming Laptop,
Expertly Chosen A BTech student walks in overwhelmed by options. Our team understands the budget, the games, the performance needs — and finds the exact HP Victus or Lenovo Legion that fits. Not the most expensive. The right one.
02 The Creator More RAM. Faster SSD.
New Life. A content creator's aging laptop starts slowing down. We upgrade the RAM, install a fast NVMe SSD, and breathe new life into the machine — saving thousands compared to buying new, with same-day turnaround.
03 The Builder Dream PC.
Built in Nanded. A passionate gamer brings us a vision — ASUS ROG motherboard, NVIDIA GPU, Cooler Master cabinet. We source every component, assemble with precision, cable-manage it beautifully, and test it before handover.
04 The Loyal Customer Trusted for Years.
Always Local. After a warranty issue, the customer doesn't deal with an out-of-city service center alone. We coordinate it. We follow up. We call when it's done. That's the difference between a shop and a relationship.
Inside The Showroom
STEP INSIDE
RUTVI TECH

What We Do
OUR
SPECIALIZATIONS

Six things we do exceptionally well. Not because we offer everything — because we've focused on being the best at these for Nanded's gaming community.

01
Gaming Laptops
HP Victus, HP Omen, Lenovo Legion, ASUS ROG, Acer Predator, MSI — latest models with expert guidance to match the right machine to your actual use case.
In-store Demo
02
Custom PC Builds
Tell us your goals and budget. We source, assemble, cable manage and test your dream PC — with NVIDIA or AMD Radeon GPU, your choice of cabinet and cooling.
Custom Quote
03
Laptop Upgrades
RAM expansion, SSD upgrades, thermal repasting — unlock the true potential of your existing machine without buying new. Fast turnaround, same-day possible.
Same-Day Service
04
Laptop Repairs
Screen replacement, keyboard issues, charging port repairs, motherboard diagnostics — transparent pricing, honest advice, quality parts.
Diagnostic First
05
Gaming Accessories
Mechanical keyboards, high-DPI gaming mice, surround-sound headsets, mouse pads, controller stands — everything to complete your gaming station.
Try Before You Buy
06
Performance Consultation
Not sure what to buy, upgrade, or fix? Book a free in-store consultation. We'll analyze your current setup and tell you exactly what will make the biggest difference.
Free Consultation

PC Zone
CUSTOM PC
YOUR WAY
We build custom PCs from scratch based on your exact requirements and budget. AMD or Intel processor, NVIDIA or AMD Radeon GPU — assembled, tested, and delivered with a warranty.
CPU: Intel Core / AMD Ryzen
GPU: NVIDIA RTX / AMD Radeon
Cabinets: Cooler Master, Antec, Deepcool
Full cable management included
Burn-in tested before delivery
Discuss Your Build →
Accessories Zone
COMPLETE YOUR
BATTLE STATION
Feel every keystroke on a mechanical keyboard. Try different mouse weights and DPI. Test headset sound stages. We have it all in store so you choose what's right for you.
Mechanical keyboards — tactile & linear switches
Gaming mice — lightweight to precision
Headsets — 7.1 surround, noise cancellation
Mouse pads, cooling pads & more
Ask for Stock →
Upgrade Zone
UPGRADE.
NOT REPLACE.
Before you spend on a new machine, let us show you what upgrading your current one can do. More RAM means faster multitasking. A new SSD means Windows boots in under 10 seconds.
RAM upgrades — 8GB → 16GB → 32GB
SSD replacements — NVMe Gen 4 speeds
Thermal paste replacement — up to 20°C cooler

Why Choose Us
WHAT MAKES
US DIFFERENT

Nanded has options. But only Rutvi Tech gives you expert guidance with a local face you can return to.

100% Original Products
Every laptop, component, and accessory comes with official manufacturer warranty and proper invoice. No grey market, no refurbished sold as new.
Truly Local Support
Walk in, call, or WhatsApp. We're right here in Nanded. No waiting on hold with a national call center. No shipping your laptop somewhere unknown.
Expert Recommendations
We don't push the most expensive option. We ask what you play, how you use it, what your budget is — and recommend what genuinely makes sense for you.
After-Sales Relationship
The sale doesn't end at the counter. Questions after setup? Performance issues? Warranty claims? We're your point of contact — before and after.
